title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Walmart India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Walmart India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Walmart India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India:
Walmart India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
